title: schoenoplectus californicus subsp. tereticulmis
intro: Schoenoplectus californicus subsp. tereticulmis, also known as California bulrush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus californicus subsp. tereticulmis include its ability to treat various health issues such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
